title: Trump’s Iran Proposal Has Echoes of Half-Finished Gaza Deal

summary: Judges and grand juries have increasingly lost faith in the Justice Department as the president uses it to reward his friends and go after his opponents.

summary: The co-founder of a prominent A.I. company was nearby as the pope implored A.I. leaders to slow down and consider the technology’s possible perils.

summary: In his letter, the first American pontiff called for putting care for humans at the heart of technological change.

summary: The risk of a large explosion has been averted, officials say. But a smaller blast remains possible, and 16,000 people remain displaced.

title: Inside India’s Manipur State, Where Violence and Division Are Routine

title: A Dissident Escapes China by Rubber Boat and Lands in South Korea
